description: PR5 — greedy→SA handoff. Three shared-student sections are funneled onto SUN only (non-SUN days blocked), so greedy is forced to clump them across SUN 08:00/09:30/11:00. That produces a 105-min gap between the first and third (cost≈525). SA's option walker does NOT apply blocked_slots, so it can relocate one section to MON/TUE/WED/THU and drop the total cost by ≥500, which must emit SA_RELOCATE_ACCEPTED with stage_origin='sa'.
notes: Three sections share 10 students → every pair has shared=10, w=min(10,30)*0.5=5.

blocked_slots removes all 3 start times on MON/TUE/WED/THU, so greedy's option generator yields only SUN placements. With shared students forbidding same-slot collisions, greedy fills SUN 08:00 / 09:30 / 11:00 across the three sections — this is the 'natural' clump path ChatGPT's amendment asked for.

SA's valid_options enumerates all WEEKDAYS × slot_config (ignores blocked_slots — see timetable_local_search._generate_relocate_move callers). Moving any one section off SUN drops its shared-day gap contribution to 0.
Post-SA target: ≤2 sections per SUN (or all on different days) → total cost ≤150 (back-to-back only). ΔCost ≥525 comfortably triggers relocation acceptance and an SA_RELOCATE_ACCEPTED emission.
